subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the sure handle, open the eye of insight and behold the light of truth, and see the outpourings of the Abhá Kingdom manifested in the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بعروه وثقی چشم بصیرت گشا نور حقیقت بین آثار فیوضات ملکوت ابهی از جهان
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
